     The Numbers Business Report

Robin Hood (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $30,824,628Details
International Box Office $54,385,384
Worldwide Box Office $85,210,012
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,357,047
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $6,194,810
Total $9,551,857
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Robin of Loxley, a war-hardened Crusader and his Moorish commander mount an audacious revolt against the corrupt English crown in this timeless romance.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,195,670 (29.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.35 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:36.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$99,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,827 opening theaters/2,939 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $40,466,613

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 21st, 2018 (Wide) by Lionsgate
November 21st, 2018 (IMAX) by Lionsgate
International Releases: November 21st, 2018 (Wide) (Aruba)
November 21st, 2018 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
November 21st, 2018 (Wide) (West Indies)
November 21st, 2018 (Wide) (Philippines)
November 21st, 2018 (Wide) (Curacao)
Video Release: February 5th, 2019 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for extended sequences of violence and action, and some suggestive references.
(Rating bulletin 2515 (Cert #51477), 2/21/2018)
Running Time: 116 minutes
Geographical setting: England
Plot point: Love Triangle, Relationships Gone Wrong, Revenge, Robin Hood Bandits, Romance
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Time period setting: 1300s
Source:Based on Folk Tale/Legend/Fairytale
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Appian Way, Safehouse Pictures, Summit Entertainment, Thunder Road Film
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
